title: Recover TerraYield mega task result and validate current state
note: Recover local mega report, validate endpoints, summarize current state. Wait 8-10 minutes before writing devam et.
command: Write-Output 'TASK: Mega 011 result recovery'; Write-Output 'PROGRESS: 97%'; Write-Output 'TIME:'; Get-Date; Write-Output '--- latest mega reports ---'; Get-ChildItem -Path '.aays_next_fix' -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter summary.md | Where-Object { $_.FullName -like '*mega*' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 12 FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output '--- latest mega detail files ---'; Get-ChildItem -Path '.aays_next_fix' -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter detail.txt | Where-Object { $_.FullName -like '*mega*' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 5 FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output '--- newest summary content preview ---'; $s=Get-ChildItem -Path '.aays_next_fix' -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter summary.md | Where-Object { $_.FullName -like '*mega*' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if ($s) { Get-Content -Path $s.FullName -Raw | Select-Object -First 1 } else { Write-Output 'NO_MEGA_SUMMARY_FOUND' }; Write-Output '--- git status ---'; git status --short; Write-Output '--- endpoint validation ---'; foreach ($ep in @('/health','/openapi.json','/map/listings','/map/sales-history/status','/map/sales-history/external-evidence','/map/sales-history/parcels','/map/sales-history/combined','/map/listings')) { try { $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew(); $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ('http://localhost:8010' + $ep) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 75; $sw.Stop(); $cache=$r.Headers['X-AAYS-Cache']; Write-Output ('OK ' + $ep + ' status=' + $r.StatusCode + ' ms=' + $sw.ElapsedMilliseconds + ' bytes=' + $r.Content.Length + ' cache=' + $cache) } catch { Write-Output ('FAIL ' + $ep + ' error=' + $_.Exception.Message) } }; Write-Output '--- docker ps ---'; docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.aays-fast-start.yml ps 2>&1; Write-Output '--- recent api errors ---'; docker logs --tail 180 terrayield_land_api 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'Only lon/lat|Traceback|Exception|ERROR|timeout|geography|status' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -Last 80 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }; Write-Output 'MEGA_011_RESULT_RECOVERY_DONE'
